name: Marshmellow Meringue Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one unbaked 9-inch pie shell on the lower rack of a preheated oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Drizzle the apple slices with lemon juice and toss them with sugar, flour, and cinnamon until evenly coated.
3. Spoon the spiced apples into the pie shell.
4. Bake for 35 minutes at 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until they form soft peaks.
7. Gradually add marshmallow creme while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
8. Spread the meringue mixture over the apples and along the edge of the crust.
9. Bake for an additional 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, or until lightly browned.
Source: newsletter, Nov '89, Dolores McCann
